structural_blocks.summary: The document header containing the title 'INVOICE' and company name 'CONTOSO LTD.'.
Invoice metadata including invoice number, date, due date, customer name, and customer ID.
Address details for billing, shipping, and service locations for Microsoft Corporation.
Table 1.1 containing sales transaction details such as salesperson, P.O. number, and terms.
Line item row detailing the quantity, description, unit price, and total for a test service.
Subtotal, sales tax, total, previous balance, and total due amounts for the invoice.
A note thanking the customer for their business.
